llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: GDF/CS_Senior Developer
job.department: GDF/CS Digital Twins for SC & Inventory
job.description: Fullstack Developer / Engineer Main Requirenents: A Master degree in the field of computer science, mathematics, life sciences, chemistry, business administration, or related discipline with at least 1 year of experience in a similar role A Bachelor degree in the field of computer science, mathematics, life sciences, chemistry, business administration, or related discipline with at least 3 years of experience in a similar role Provide expertise in the technical stack development of complex scenarios / workflows such as collaborative problem solving in supply chain domain. At least 4 years of software development experience with JavaScript, Node.js, Spring Boot or .NET Core with MS SQL and NoSQL database Angular / Vue/ HTML5 and CSS Unit Testing using Jasmine, Karma, NUnit At least a year of software engineering experience with Experience constructing, developing, and implementing microservices Maintaining infrastructure as code Experience working on a DevOps team Experience with configuring and deploying in Microsoft Azure Has experience in developing and maintaining data-driven applications Experience in data integration, ETL processes, and linked data applications using tools like Microsoft Databricks, Kettle and Docker Business consulting and technical consulting skills A growth mindset with a curiosity to learn and improve. Team player with strong interpersonal, written, and verbal communication skills. You can demonstrate fluent communication skills in English (spoken and written).
